TextENGNew: "And so!! Today's last-place finisher is officially Keiichi Maebara~~!!!"
"Uwaahhhhh!! A-A-Again!! I lost agaaain!!"
And so it was that Keiichi Maebara's humiliating punishment game was decided once more today.
As for just how humiliating this particular punishment game was — well, out of respect for his dignity, let's keep that a secret for now...
"Nowaahhhh!! Stop, please forgive me!! Heeeeee! Now I'll never find a bride!!"
changeReason: Original says 'I can't get married anymore' while new says 'Now I'll never find a bride' — お婿に行けなくなる means specifically unable to go as a groom/husband, new captures this differently.

TextENGNew: "Why, why can't I ever win...?! I've clearly been on a losing streak lately. I'm practically the punishment game regular at this point. ...Am I destined to be everyone's dress-up doll forever??!!"
Keiichi was experiencing firsthand the truth behind the expression 'crying into one's pillow'...
"Ahhhh... O gods, O Buddha, if you exist somewhere, please hear my prayer. I want to stop losing at club games! Please, grant me the power to remain undefeated!!"
...Just then,@k that reassuring voice@k drifted down from the ceiling of the room.
changeReason: Old translation truncates to just 'Just then!!' — the entire clause about the reassuring voice drifting down from the ceiling is omitted, losing substantial narrative content.

TextENGNew: Don't be so distant, Keeeeeeeei!!
changeReason: Original uses dialogue quotation marks while new removes them, changing from spoken dialogue to narrated/internal voice.

TextENGNew: God, Buddha, the Holy Mother Maria!! You pray to all manner of beings — yet there are far more reliable allies right here for you to ask!!
changeReason: Same format change: dialogue to narration, plus different content emphasis.

TextENGNew: Exactly so, nfu fu fu!!
changeReason: Same format change: dialogue to narration.

TextENGNew: Th-That voice — Tommy?! Cloud?! Iri?!
changeReason: Same format change: dialogue to narration.

TextENGNew: ""The Dark Four Heavenly Kings — present!!!""
changeReason: Original uses individual character quotes while new uses double-quoted pair format for simultaneous speech (「「」」).

TextENGNew: With a bang, a ceiling panel flew open, and three figures came swooping down from above!!
"Whoa!! W-What are you all doing here at this hour?! ...I'll overlook the part about you appearing from the ceiling for now..."
"Isn't it obvious? We are soul brothers — bound by spirit!!"
"That's right, K! Your troubles are our troubles!! You were crying just now, weren't you?! About how you can't win at club activities lately!!"
"Nfu fu fu! We shall grant your wish brilliantly!! We'll make you win!! We shall bestow upon you the power of victory!!"
"U-Uwaaah, everyone~!! Thank you~~!!!!"
Squeeze! Four men locked themselves in a tight embrace.
It was a moving scene of ardent camaraderie...
"I want to win so badly, but I just can't manage it. Why is that..."
"K. Why do you want to win? Is it because you simply don't want to lose?"
"Well, yeah... The punishment games have been escalating in embarrassment lately. ...So I want to avoid last place at all costs..."
"That passive attitude is precisely the problem!"
"'As long as I avoid last place, I won't be punished' — that kind of defeatist fighting spirit is exactly why you can't win!!"
"Y-You're... you're right! Right now I'm not aiming for first. I figure it's enough if I can just avoid the punishment games..."
"I see you've realized it. Your fear of punishment games stripped away your hungry fangs somewhere along the way."
"When you reclaim those fangs, K — your true strength will finally bloom!!!"
"You really are my seniors in life... But how do I get my fangs back...?"
"You lost your fangs because you feared the punishment games."
"But by turning to those same punishment games, you can get them back!!"
"C-Cloud, just what do you mean by that...?!"
"So — the punishment games, I said!! The punishment gaaaaames!!!"
"Take Mion-chan, for instance. She's the one who always forces you into embarrassing costumes, isn't she?! What if you turned the tables and made her wear embarrassing costumes instead?!"
"When it comes to embarrassing things Mion made me wear... that's the one! When she made me wear the school swimsuit!! The humiliation of that day will haunt me for the rest of my life!!"
"Yes!! Take revenge for that humiliation!! Make Mion-san wear a school swimsuit!!"
"Oh, but just making her wear it isn't enough, is it. What about making her attend class in it for a full day~!!"
""Wh-Wh-WHAT did you say?!?!""
"I-I always thought punishment games were only a few minutes of suffering... B-By extending it to an entire day... what a diabolical punishment!!"
In Iri's fantasy, Mion was forced to wear a school swimsuit all day without being allowed to change.
"The impossible pairing of a swimsuit with socks and shoes — isn't that delightful~!!"
"And attending class dressed like that... face burning red the whole time...?"
"Huoooooh!! That's great!! That's really great!!!"
It would be so embarrassing her face would catch fire — yet the rules of her own club were the one thing she couldn't break, so she'd have to endure the humiliation through every class period.
Seeing that look on Mion's face — usually so supremely self-assured — would be a joy that surpassed any other victory.
changeReason: Original describes Mion's joy at winning, while new describes imagining this look on Mion's face as joy — subtle POV shift.

TextENGNew: "Well, K?! Wouldn't a punishment game like this make you actually want to win?!"
"It does!! It really does!! Iri, you're a genius!!!"
"Now now, K, that's just the beginning! Now that you've found your reason to beat Mion-chan, let's keep going and find reasons to beat every other club member too!!!"
""Yeaaah!!!!""
"Well, after Mion, it'd have to be Rena."
"School swimsuits are lovely, but everyone — we absolutely must include a maid outfit~!"
"Ohhh, that's wonderful, really wonderful — I think a maid outfit would suit Rena-chan beautifully!!"
"Nfu fu fu! Now now, simply making her wear something doesn't constitute a punishment game on its own!"
"What is it, Cloud? So we make Maid Rena attend class in it too?"
Cloud wagged his finger with a tsk-tsk-tsk and flashed a broad grin.
"What I have in mind is something altogether refreshing — having her help you eat yogurt!"
"...Come again? Cloud, how exactly is that a punishment game?"
In Cloud's fantasy, Maid Rena had been made to hold a short spoon backwards in her mouth.
And then, with that spoon, she awkwardly scooped up yogurt and carried it — trembling — toward the winner's waiting lips...
Since she wasn't using her hands, yogurt dripped down to stain her chest and the corners of her mouth, and that image alone was something extraordinary.
And then the spoon in her mouth drew close to his face... close enough to feel the warmth of her breath...
And when she delivered the yogurt to his lips, their mouths nearly met across the spoon... Whoooa!
"Mfufu, you know — this is actually a game they play at a certain kind of establishment. Perhaps it was a little too stimulating for a young fellow like you, Maebara-san~~!!"
"C-Cloud~!!! I had no idea such establishments existed~~!!!"
"Mfu fu!! When it comes to adult establishments, leave it all to this Cloud!!!"
""Yeaaahhhhh!! Cloud is the best!!!""
"All right, now what should I do to Satoko and Rika-chan?! That pair has put me through plenty too!!"
"This time I'd like to incorporate Angel Mort uniforms. They've been dressing you up for so long — surely you'd like to return the favor for once!"
"Ha ha ha ha! Just making them wear it wouldn't be satisfying enough, of course!
"And so! I have a brilliant idea! Here it is!!"
"We have them take over cleaning duty!! Wiping down the windows, for instance."
"Tomi, the concept is interesting, but it's missing something essential in the moe department. Why window-wiping, of all things?"
In Tomi's fantasy, Satoko and Rika had been made to change into size-S Angel Mort uniforms.
Having never imagined she'd end up in something like this, Satoko's face was bright red as she glared at them, desperately hiding her embarrassment.
Then the two of them dragged a desk to the window and climbed up on top of it.
"And here is where we get to the heart of the matter."
"We have them wipe the windows — with their bodies!!!"
Pffft!!
Bright red mist sprays from the noses of K, Cloud, and Iri.
In their shared fantasy, the two girls had never imagined they'd be made to do this in those uniforms, and even the normally unflappable Rika-chan had her gaze cast downward in embarrassment.
...And then, together, they rubbed the glass in circles — squeak... squeak... squeak...
According to Tomi, the key was that it was glass.
That is to say — you could watch from both inside and outside the windows!!
As expected of a wild bird photographer!! His obsessions were on another level entirely!
"Well?! What do you think of my punishment game?!!"
""Tomi!! Tomi!!! Tomi!!! You're the greatest — WOOOAHHHH!!!""
"Oh right — now that I think about it, I've got a score to settle with Shion too!!!"
"Very good! Let's come up with a revenge punishment game worthy of washing away K's grudge!!"
"Mfufu~!! Well, the Sonozaki twins do have some wonderful figures! This really gets my blood pumping!"
"I'm thinking stripping-type for this one~!! One article at a time, just like Ryuugu-san made you do once!"
"...Hm! I've got an idea, everyone!! Listen to what this K has come up with!!!"
"First — we have Shion put on a school swimsuit."
"You put Mion-chan in one already. There's no novelty in that, is there?"
"Tsk tsk tsk! Tomi, don't rush to conclusions now!"
"And then, on top of that — we have her put on a full gym uniform. Then we make her strip!"
"We have her pull the gym shorts halfway off — just halfway!!!"
""Wh-What on earth is this combination?!?!""
changeReason: Original says 'My mind cannot comprehend such a collaboration' while new says 'What on earth is this combination' — different emphasis, both expressing shock.

TextENGNew: In K's fantasy, Shion was on her knees in her gym uniform, face bright red.
And then... unable to disobey the winner's command, trembling, she pulled her gym shorts halfway down...
The school swimsuit's waistband peeked out from beneath the half-removed shorts!!!

A school swimsuit on its own would have caused no embarrassment at all — but by revealing it through the act of removing gym shorts, it produced a thrilling appeal that the swimsuit alone could never have achieved!!
"What a combination this is, K!!! Two outfits that would never ordinarily go together, each drawing out the other's finest qualities to create something transcendent!!"
changeReason: Original says 'An impossible, absolutely impossible pairing' while new says 'Two outfits that would never ordinarily go together' — different intensity.

TextENGNew: ""A-Amazing, Keeeeeeeeiii!! Woooaaahhhhhh!!""
"Ah — ahem. Everyone? She isn't a club member, but since we're at it — why don't we think up something for our dear Takano-san~~!!"
"Hmmmm!! You're right — that bewitching figure of hers is perfect punishment game material!!"
"But... Takano-san seems so composed and self-assured... An ordinary punishment game probably wouldn't faze her at all."
"Which simply means, K!! We'll just have to devise an even more extraordinary punishment game!!"
"Kuooohhhhh!! Now I'm really fired up!! Ahh, what kind of punishment game should we inflict on Takano-san?!"
"I've had a flash of inspiration — I think that voluptuous figure of hers would look absolutely stunning in a bunny suit."
"Hmmmm... Shops with bunny girls..."
"Oh yes — that's it, the kind where they hold the lighter tucked in their cleavage!"
"You simply cannot leave that out!!"
"But Cloud, the club activities involve K and the students — wouldn't things like lighters be a bit inappropriate?"
"Hm!! Tomi, that's it!!! She can tuck something from the school in there instead!!"
"You know how they have recorders?!"
"Ahhhh!! You mean the flute instrument!! A-And that would go in... Takano-san's impossibly ample chest... tucked right between her... cleavage!!!"
"Wh-Whoa, you're actually going to make Takano-san do that?!!?"
"...You know... I actually happen to own a recorder."
"Maybe I'll quietly test this hypothesis sometime..."
"W-Wait, no cutting in line, Tomi!! Aren't we Soul Brothers??!!"
"Come to think of it, my grandmother has a shakuhachi — I'll bring it next time!!"
"Hmmmm! I used to play the transverse flute — would that count...?"
""It more than counts!!!!""
"Oh, and we mustn't forget — there's Chie-sensei. As an educator who teaches discipline, she'd never be able to violate the rules of a punishment game!!"
"Ch-Chie-sensei?! ...Our teacher in a punishment game... I'd never once considered that..."
"Nfu fu! Because Chie-sensei is your homeroom teacher, K, she slipped right past your 'she's a woman' filter~ But Chie-sensei is truly remarkable!!"
"Her flawlessly proportioned figure leaves no room for complaint!! If Takano-san possesses a demonic allure, then Chie-sensei's charm is pure and angelic!!"
"Imagining the body concealed beneath that summer dress is the last paradise of intellectual fancy still available to men of our years!!"
"...Ugh... When you put it that way... I feel like I won't be able to look Chie-sensei in the eyes tomorrow..."

"What's gotten into you, K?! You just devised such a shameful punishment game for Shion-chan — and now you're going to say you can't see a woman as a woman just because she's your teacher?! You're sorely in need of an education!!!"
"Chie-sensei... her bottom is quite attractive, isn't it."
"Mm... *gulp*. Indeed, there's something about the firmness of it... quite fine!!"
"Iri, your powers of observation are formidable!! As expected of a school physician~~!!"
"The essential first step is to demolish the sanctuary of teacherhood!!"
"What about this then?! A punishment game that uses the posterior!!!"
""U-Ugyyaaaahhhh!!!!! WHAT kind of situation is THAT, Tomi??!!!""
"Ah — no, sorry, I meant a display of posterior artistry."
changeReason: Original says 'not demand to see her butt, to see her do something with it' while new says 'a display of posterior artistry' — different explanation of 尻芸.

TextENGNew: "...You know, that game you played as a child — writing letters in the air with your bottom."
"I see! And we'd make her perform it in front of the entire student body, teacher though she is!!"
"Humiliation play~~!!! Tomi, I think we have more and more in common every day!!"
"...Ku ku ku ku! Tomi, Iri — don't you think there's still something missing?"
"Hmm, so K — you're saying you'd add something further to this?"
"Ku ku ku!! We have Chie-sensei hold that embarrassing pose... and serve as a model for a school-wide sketching competition!!!"
""A-A-A-A-A school-wide!! Sketching?!? Competition!!""
"Th-That's incredible, K!!! No cameras, right? It has to be sketching, right?!"
"Hmmmm, I've suddenly been seized by an overwhelming desire to embrace the fine arts of autumn!!!"
"It really does come back to Chie-sensei's posterior, doesn't it..."
"Do you see it, everyone? This is what a punishment game is!! You have to go this far for it to qualify as punishment!!!"
""Keeeei! Keeeei! Keeeei!!! Yeeeahhhhh!!!""
"Thank you, everyone!! I finally want to win again. You've reminded me how sweet victory truly is!!"
"This is as far as we can assist you!!"
"K — now all that remains is for you to seize victory!!"
"That's right — but I won't be seizing it alone. We will be, together!!!! With the power of our fantasies!!!!"
At that moment, Keiichi felt his power rising until it seemed to touch the heavens.
An overwhelming power — one that would part a rain shower to walk through dry, or cleave the sea open to make way for his passage!
